name: Glimmer Cape
description: The stolen cape of a master illusionist.

abilities.name: Glimmer
abilities.description: Applies a buff that periodically turns the target invisible and phased over the duration, even if the invisibility gets broken. Cooldown: 15. Mana Cost: 125. Cast Range: 600. Duration: 5. Magical Damage Barrier: 375. Move Speed Bonus: 20. Grants the target a magical damage barrier for the whole duration. Depleting the barrier does not prematurely end the ability.
